def test_enrich_users_domain_filter():
        """Priority 1: domain_filter removes non-matching users."""
        sample = [
            {"id": 1, "name": "Alice", "email": "alice@example.com"},
            {"id": 2, "name": "Bob", "email": "bob@other.com"},
        ]
